rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a thorough copy-edit pass, improving readability and consistency without losing meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged some uncertainties but did not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors were introduced, but minor potential issues were noted.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits lacked full annotation.
